title: To A Squirrel At Kyle-na-gno
content:
Come play with me;
Why should you run
Through the shaking tree
As though I�d a gun
To strike you dead?
When all I would do
Is to scratch your head
And let you go.
meaning:
William Butler Yeats's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "To A Squirrel At Kyle-na-gno"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
